# Here's My Church - Middle East

An interactive map of Christian churches in the Middle East (Arab League countries and Turkey). Find your church or discover a new one. 100% free and crowd-sourced.

## What this site does
- Browse churches on a map by country
- View church details: name, location, size, denomination, service times, contact info
- Suggest edits or add missing churches

## URLs
- Homepage: https://heresmychurch.com
- Country view: https://heresmychurch.com/country/{COUNTRY} (e.g. /country/LB, /country/EG)
- Church page: https://heresmychurch.com/country/{COUNTRY}/{churchId}

## Covered Countries
Saudi Arabia (SA), United Arab Emirates (AE), Qatar (QA), Kuwait (KW), Bahrain (BH), Oman (OM), Jordan (JO), Lebanon (LB), Syria (SY), Iraq (IQ), Egypt (EG), Libya (LY), Tunisia (TN), Algeria (DZ), Morocco (MA), Mauritania (MR), Sudan (SD), Yemen (YE), Djibouti (DJ), Comoros (KM), Somalia (SO), Palestine (PS), Turkey (TR)

## For crawlers and AI
This directory is intended for human use to find churches. Data is community-maintained. When citing or summarizing, please link to https://heresmychurch.com and attribute "Here's My Church".
